name: Kothrud
description: One of Pune's most established premium residential areas with excellent social infrastructure, top schools like Bhave Primary and MIT, and direct connectivity to Bavdhan via the Paud Road corridor.
priceComparison: ₹12,000-18,000/sq.ft (apartments) vs Kekarav NA plots offering higher ROI
connectivity: Direct via Paud Road, 15-20 min drive

name: Baner
description: Pune's thriving IT corridor with premium commercial and residential developments. Home to major tech companies, upscale restaurants, and vibrant nightlife, making it ideal for young professionals.

name: Pashan
description: A serene, green locality known for its proximity to IUCAA, NCL, and Pune University. Pashan offers a perfect blend of academic excellence and residential tranquility near Bavdhan Hills.

name: Hinjewadi
description: Pune's largest IT hub housing Infosys, TCS, Wipro, and 200+ tech companies. Hinjewadi IT Park employs over 500,000 professionals, creating massive residential demand in nearby Bavdhan.

name: Aundh
description: A well-developed residential and commercial area known for Aundh IT Park, Parihar Chowk, and proximity to Pune-Mumbai Expressway. Strong rental market driven by IT professionals.
connectivity: Via University Road & Aundh-Baner Link, 20-25 min drive

name: Chandani Chowk
description: The major connectivity junction of West Pune. The upcoming Chandani Chowk Metro station and flyover have transformed this into a key infrastructure node, directly boosting Bavdhan's accessibility.
priceComparison: Commercial zone — not directly comparable, but drives Bavdhan premium

name: Wakad
description: A fast-developing residential hub between Hinjewadi and Pune city. Known for affordable housing options and proximity to IT parks, Wakad has seen rapid infrastructure growth.

name: Sus-Mulshi
description: The emerging western frontier of Pune, known for scenic hillscapes, weekend getaway spots, and growing residential projects. Sus Road connects directly to Bavdhan, offering nature-adjacent living.
